title: rubus schubei
intro: Rubus schubei, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Rubus schubei include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve pain and fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus schubei can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
